meaning: 德川(创建日本德川幕府的德川家族)
examples: The Tokugawa shoguns began to look to other sources for revenue.
Regrettably, the Tokugawa shoguns' search for solvency for the government made it increasingly difficult for individual Japanese who lived on fixed stipends to make ends meet.
Tokugawa Leyacu is big, he is Japan only's general.
It is during the Tokugawa era - known as Edo - when official documents make brief references to ninjas' activities.
